2606.09390.title: Real-time body pose non-verbal communication with a consistency-based reliability measure
2606.09390.paper_summary: Body movement communicates intent at distances and in conditions where neither the face, nor speech can be captured. We study the recognition of communicative intent from 2D body pose alone. We argue that body motion is a reliable signal especially in scenarios that require real time low-cost on-device person-to-robot communication in long distance environments, such as rescue missions. However, existing resources do not isolate this signal. Affective corpora combine body, face, voice and text, while skeleton action-recognition benchmarks label the action performed rather than the message conveyed. We release a dataset of real frames of full-body pose covering ten communicative intents and we compare it against other real (IPC) and synthetic (MotionLCM, VEO3.1, Kimodo) ones that span a range of difficulty. We target systems that can run on a robot's limited onboard hardware. We benchmark multiple models, from skeleton graph classifiers to joint motion-forecasting networks, and report performance metrics together with frame rate on an embedded GPU (NVIDIA Orin~Nano), since speed matters as much as accuracy in our scenario. Finally, we show that a model's own autoregressive self-consistency works as an unsupervised reliability signal. We give a short proof that bounds the probability that a self-consistent prediction is correct, show that this probability grows with the number of consistent steps, and identify the conditions under which a confident prediction can still be false, benchmarked against industry-standard metrics.
2606.09390.paper_summary_zh: 身體動作在面部或語音無法捕捉的距離和條件下傳達意圖。我們研究僅從2D身體姿勢識別傳達意圖。我們認為，身體運動是一個可靠的信號，特別是在需要實時低成本的設備上人機通信的長距離環境中，例如救援任務。然而，現有資源並未孤立這一信號。情感語料庫結合了身體、面部、聲音和文本，而骨架動作識別基準標記的是執行的動作，而不是傳達的訊息。我們發布了一個涵蓋十種傳達意圖的全身姿勢真實幀數據集，並將其與其他真實（IPC）和合成（MotionLCM、VEO3.1、Kimodo）數據集進行比較，這些數據集涵蓋了不同的難度範圍。我們的目標是能在機器人有限的板載硬體上運行的系統。我們基準測試了多個模型，從骨架圖分類器到關節運動預測網絡，並報告了性能指標以及在嵌入式GPU（NVIDIA Orin~Nano）上的幀率，因為在我們的場景中，速度和準確性一樣重要。最後，我們展示了一個模型自身的自回歸自一致性作為一種無監督的可靠性信號。我們給出了一個簡短的證明，界定了自一致預測正確的概率，顯示這一概率隨著一致步驟的增加而增長，並確定了自信預測仍然可能是錯誤的條件，並以行業標準指標進行基準測試。
2606.09390.author: Alina Marcu et.al.
2606.09390.authors: Alina Marcu, Dragos Costea, Cristina Lazar, Marius Leordeanu
